textByHash.de52c87e9187c0d337aa261f1db89fb056b337fb: Only what I've heard around the place. That funny guy by the sea keeps suggesting they're being taken in the night, which is absurd really.
textByHash.cf7eab6b0a812686f7d0d26d4b25046d07193aac: He's always going on about strange people coming in the night, but no one would dare do that with the ents around. It's a load of rubbish.
textByHash.2e2dffc403ab1735e7df0c23fe12d3e408a335ee: It would take a lot of things happening right before my eyes for me to even consider it.
textByHash.dfb9b6734e2f09a5601cbd63ec360f7e46a4e02f: I think that some of them are accidents. Others might just be leaving.
textByHash.6dbd694fdfa84e4ee3c98d1f909d86b360174201: Like what? Murder? I'm not sure who would want to kill folk around here. We're a tight community.
textByHash.68deaaa67ca791cc59edf215307d0e8a611674c5: Not really. I'm sure if you keep asking around you'll find someone who can help you. Just don't waste your time on that funny guy by the sea...
textByHash.e4412251affa56a780d1b9feed05be508ab6a413: Ah, it's you. I hear you're still looking into the case of those missing people. Must say, you're the first person in a while to actually stick to it.
textByHash.350513deb5df4652d8e8ec1179bb557d8b1acba6: Clearly. Anyway, good luck with it.
textByHash.de99dceb7c1b2591b6ba6819d5b678fbfa8635ca: Ah, it's you. I hear you've become a bit of a hero around here. Not a bad job.
textByHash.6ddb4762bce5bf9923158fed750adc61070c95c3: Hello. Here for a drink? You've picked the right place if so.
